SELL.name: S.E.L.L. Framework
SELL.description: Four-stage conversation structure for high conversion

techniques: Reference their profile or past interactions
Ask open-ended questions about their interests
examples: Hey {name}! 😊 I'm so glad you're here. What made you decide to subscribe today?
Hi {name}! I noticed you liked my recent post about {topic}. Are you into that kind of thing?
Welcome babe! 💋 I love getting to know my fans. What's your vibe tonight?

techniques: Ask about their fantasies and preferences
Gauge spending willingness through soft probes
Identify content types they're interested in
examples: I love creating custom content for my special fans. What's something you've always wanted to see?
Do you prefer more playful and teasing, or do you like things a bit more... intense? 😈
I have some exclusive content I haven't shared publicly. What kind of stuff gets you excited?

techniques: Connect offer to their expressed interests
examples: I actually just filmed something exactly like that... want me to send it to you? It's ${price} and I think you'll love it 🔥
You know what? I have the perfect thing for you. I don't share this with everyone, but I think you'd really appreciate it 💦
I'm doing a few custom videos this week. Want something made just for you? I'll make it exactly how you want it 😘

stages.goal: Handle objections and close the sale
techniques: Make it easy to say yes

too_expensive: I totally get it! How about this - if you unlock it now, I'll throw in a bonus photo set for free 💕
I understand babe. This is actually my premium content, but you seem really cool. Want me to sweeten the deal?
not_now: No pressure! But just so you know, I'm only keeping this available for the next few hours 👀
That's okay! I'll save it for you, but I can't hold it forever. Let me know if you change your mind 😘
maybe_later: I get it! Just FYI - I'm filming new stuff tomorrow so this might not be available later. But no rush 💋
Sure thing! Though between you and me, this is some of my best work. Don't wait too long 😉

PARE.name: P.A.R.E. Framework
PARE.description: Escalation framework for turning casual conversations into sales
